title: Odal Node — Electronics Sector Data (v1.0.0)
description: ICT and electronics fields. Regulatory basis: Regulation (EU) 2023/1670 (ecodesign, smartphones & slate tablets) and Regulation (EU) 2023/1669 (energy labelling), in force since 2025-06-20. Applicability dates and regulatory status are held in the sector manifest, not here.

energyEfficiencyClass.description: EU energy label class (A = most efficient, G = least efficient).

co2ePerUnitKg.description: Whole-lifecycle carbon footprint in kg CO2e per unit.

repairabilityScore.description: Repairability score 0.0-10.0 (non-regulatory heuristic, not EN 45554 / EU 2023/1669). >= 6.0 is considered good.

sparePartsAvailable.description: Whether spare parts are commercially available from the manufacturer.

repairManualUrl.description: URL to the repair manual or repair information portal.

disassemblyInstructionsUrl.description: URL to disassembly or dismantling instructions.

svhcSubstances.description: SVHC substances present above 0.1% w/w per REACH Article 33.

rohsCompliant.description: Whether the product complies with RoHS Directive 2011/65/EU.

criticalRawMaterials.description: Critical raw materials present per EU CRM Act 2024/1252.

recycledContentPct.description: Recycled content as a percentage of total product weight.

expectedLifetimeYears.description: Expected product lifetime in years under normal use.

firmwareUpdateUntil.description: Date until which firmware or software updates are guaranteed (ISO 8601).
